lanes.title: Roulette PoC
lanes.subtitle: Round orchestration, chip UI, and roulette-specific outcome display

lanes.title: Package Runtime
lanes.subtitle: kaspa-pof-api proof primitives verify TN10 future entropy locally

nodes.title: Committed round ready
nodes.summary: The roulette server creates a round and commits hidden seed material before chips are accepted.
nodes.compactHelp: A TN10 future-entropy round ID is ready. The server has committed hidden seed material; the browser has not seen the seed.

nodes.title: Commitment fixed
nodes.summary: hashCommitment() fixes the hidden server seed before chip placement.
nodes.compactHelp: Later reveal must match this commitment.

nodes.title: Player places chips
nodes.summary: Chip placement is roulette UI state until Spin Wheel locks and submits the ledger.

nodes.title: Spin locks ledger
nodes.summary: Spin submits the locked chip ledger and client seed to the roulette PoC server.
nodes.compactHelp: The server coordinates round closure and TN10 evidence fetching.

nodes.title: Ledger hashed
nodes.summary: hashLedger() creates the canonical bet ledger hash included in the proof bundle.
nodes.compactHelp: Verification replays this hash over the submitted chip entries.

nodes.title: TN10 Future Entropy
nodes.summary: A real future TN10 block supplies block hash, daaScore, and blueScore evidence for deriveEntropyHash().
nodes.compactHelp: The proof claim is tn10_future_entropy; browser verification checks target and block evidence through kaspa-pof-api.

nodes.title: Proof bundle returned
nodes.summary: The server returns commitment, ledger, TN10 block evidence, reveal seed, and roulette outcome evidence.
nodes.compactHelp: The bundle is evidence for the browser/package to replay, not a server verdict to trust.

nodes.title: Outcome replayed
nodes.summary: deriveOutcome() and the roulette-poc:number-v1 deriver recompute the displayed roulette result.
nodes.compactHelp: Roulette-specific result logic stays in the example consumer, not in package core.

nodes.title: Browser package verifies proof
nodes.summary: verifyFairnessProof() replays commitment, ledger, TN10 evidence, entropy, reveal, and outcome in the browser.
nodes.compactHelp: The final verdict displayed to the player comes from the imported kaspa-pof-api runtime.
